港股打新资金接力日历HK IPO Turnover Calendar

公开预览版。抓取时刻 2026-05-18T03:00:03+08:00。Mac 自动任务每天 03:00 UTC+8 触发，非港股交易日自动跳过，页面每15分钟自动刷新。Public preview. Fetched 2026-05-18T03:00:03+08:00. The Mac refresh job triggers daily at 03:00 UTC+8, skips non-HK-trading days, and this page reloads every 15 minutes.

假期按港交所口径跳过HKEX holiday basis
来源核验Source Checks
12/14
失败源不覆盖旧判断Failures do not overwrite prior view
今天的可执行结论Actionable Decision不要取消已占用资金去追另一只。1236 明天中午截止，但退款预计到 05-11，不能接 05-08 的 7630/7666。5月8组必须用独立现金，或者等可孚医疗退款到账后再分配。Do not cancel locked cash blindly. 1236 closes tomorrow noon, but its refund is expected by 05-11, so it cannot fund the 05-08 7630/7666 window. Use separate cash for the May 8 group, or wait for 1187 refund confirmation.
最高优先级风险Highest Priority Risk把“退款或之前”误读成“申购截止前可用”。券商实际入账小时未核验前，按不可用处理。Do not read "refund by" as "usable before cut-off". Until broker posting hour is verified, treat that cash as unavailable.

资金接力主时间轴Primary Turnover Timeline

标的与状态Name and Status
Today
S申购开启Offer opens
C申购截止Cut-off
A配发公布Allotment
R退款到账Refund
可无缝接力Seamless 紧张Tight
错过/不可接Missed
视野规则Sightline Rule
主轴保留最近已影响退款的标的和未来20个交易日，远期未核验标的进灰区。The axis keeps recent refund-relevant deals plus the next 20 trading days. Unverified future names stay grey.
Hover
鼠标停在条、节点、矩阵卡上，会显示来源、时点和资金判断。Hover over bars, nodes, or conflict cards for source, timing, and cash logic.
公开网站规则Public Rule
默认只展示核验字段，未核验字段必须标待核实。Only verified fields are shown by default; unresolved fields stay pending.
下一轮自动搜索Next Search
每天 03:00 触发；非港股交易日跳过；交易日重查披露易、招股书、配发公告、券商页和媒体。Daily at 03:00, the job triggers; non-HK-trading days are skipped; trading days recheck HKEX, prospectuses, allotments, brokers, and media.

当前优先级Current Priority

远期灰区Long-Sight Grey Zone

05-14 to 05-22
无已核验可申购标的，等待披露易新增招股书。No verified open deal. Wait for new HKEX prospectuses.
05-25
香港公众假期，已从交易日横轴跳过。Hong Kong public holiday. Skipped from the trading-day axis.
05-26 to 06-02
保留灰色观察，不做资金承诺。Grey watch only. No cash commitment yet.
新增标的入口New Deal Intake
下一轮任务会把新增代码自动插入时间轴。The next run will insert new tickers into the axis automatically.

互斥资金矩阵Capital Conflict Matrix

01236 -> 07630/07666

不可接力Not Relayable

1236 资金释放晚于5月8截止。不能把这笔钱算给7630/7666。1236 releases after the May 8 deadline. Do not budget it for 7630/7666.

07630 vs 07666

同窗互斥Same-Window Conflict

同日截止，同一笔现金不能全额打两只。默认 7666 优先，7630 轻仓或放弃。Same cut-off. One cash pool cannot fully fund both. Default: 7666 first, 7630 small or skip.

01187 -> 07630/07666

有条件可接Conditionally Relayable

只有账户显示可用现金后才算接力成功；未显示前按不可用。Valid only after usable cash appears in the broker account. Until then, treat it as unavailable.

    声明Disclaimer

    公开信息整理，不构成投资建议。券商退款到账时点可能不同，未核验字段均按待核实处理。Public information only, not investment advice. Broker refund posting can differ; unverified fields are marked pending.
